action.content: Write a funny, 150+ word ad for an attorney who helps poor people with their divorces. Highlight at least 3 text sections by italicize them with markdown (i.e. *highlighted section*).
action.label: context

action.content:
Hey, you're probably tired of going through the divorce process and feeling like you're losing everything. Don't worry, we're here to help you out. We're a small, friendly law firm that specializes in helping low-income individuals navigate the divorce process. We understand that life can be tough, and we want to make sure you don't have to face it alone.

Our team of attorneys is dedicated to providing affordable legal services to our clients, so you can focus on what matters most – getting back to your life. We've helped countless clients achieve financial stability and peace of mind after a divorce, and we're proud of the results we've achieved.

*Our commitment to affordability is unwavering, and we'll work tirelessly to ensure that you get the best possible outcome for your case.*

We also offer a free consultation, so you can discuss your situation with us and see if we're a good fit for you. We'll take the time to listen to your concerns and provide you with a clear plan of action.

Don't let the divorce process hold you back from achieving your goals. Contact us today, and let's work together to get you back on track. We're here to help, and we're committed to providing the best possible service to our clients.
action.label: response
